positive: A stylized, symmetrical design featuring a magnificent mountain range silhouette at dawn. The mountains are drawn with clean, sharp edges, filled with alternating layers of royal indigo and dusty sage green. In the foreground, a small, stylized group of crystalline stars and aurora borealis patterns float above a minimalist lake surface, reflecting the vibrant sky. The sky itself is a gradient wash of soft peach, pale violet, and warm gold, designed to be highly contrasted against the dark mountain shapes. The overall composition must be perfect for apparel printing, clean, bold, and visually calming. Vector illustration style, highly detailed, minimalist nature print, high contrast, centered, suitable for direct-to-garment printing.
negative: blur, watermark, signature, text, logo, letters, grainy, artifacts, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, noise, busy, photographic, realistic photo
